'''YVH 2-1S''' was a [[YVH S-series war droid]] developed by [[Tendrando Arms]]. 2-1S was part of the [[Myrkr strike team]] in the [[Mission to Myrkr]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. 2-1S was destroyed in action, sacrificing himself to optimize enemy losses and maintain the strike team's cover.
